name: Memex PAIM
description: Personal AI Memory – offline-first PWA that stores and retrieves personal knowledge on the user's device. No server, no cloud.

store.description: Store a memory entry with optional anchors, priority and type

search.description: Search stored memories by keyword, anchor or time filter

export.description: Export all memories as encrypted .memex file – always free
export.note: GDPR compliant, data stays on user device
